query:
INSERT INTO store_pins (storeCode, storeName, pin, isActive) VALUES
('tunnel', 'Tunnel', '1234', 'yes'),
('ontario', 'Ontario', '1234', 'yes'),
('mk', 'Mackay', '1234', 'yes'),
('pk', 'President Kennedy', '1234', 'yes')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pin = VALUES(pin), storeName = VALUES(storeName);
